title: Crystar[16x]
description: A crystal themed pvp texture pack!
body:
A crystal themedpvp texture pack for minecraft java 1.21.4-1.21.11.
Made by enchanted.mace(Me)(Dm me on discord if you want anything to be added or think something should be changed.)





*Requires [Entity Model Features] and [Entity Texture Features] for armor textures to work correctly.
